title: Soak Test - Headset disconnected, app in the background, phone idle
scenario: Soak test: app remains responsive and shows headset as disconnected after prolonged idle period following pairing and headset power-off
steps: Install and launch the app, pair the headset, turn off the headset, then go to the Home Screen.
Put the app in the background and leave the phone idle for several hours.
After several hours, check that the app is still running and responsive.
expected: Headset is shown as disconnected on the Home Screen. After several hours, the app is still running and responsive with no memory leaks or crashes.
